name: pns-theme
description: Project tooling for the Protests and Suffragettes WordPress theme.

scripts.compile:css: lightningcss --bundle --minify --browserslist styles/frontend.css -o styles/dist/frontend.min.css && lightningcss --bundle --minify --browserslist styles/editor.css -o styles/dist/editor.min.css
scripts.check: prettier --check "**/*.{css,js,mjs,json,md,ts}" && pnpm check:handbook && node scripts/audit-css-assets.mjs && stylelint "style.css" "styles/**/*.css" --ignore-pattern "styles/dist/**" && pnpm compile:css
scripts.test:visual: playwright test tests/visual --grep-invert "@audit" --project=desktop && playwright test tests/visual --grep "@mobile-full" --project=mobile
scripts.test:visual:list: playwright test tests/visual --grep-invert "@audit" --project=desktop --list && playwright test tests/visual --grep "@mobile-full" --project=mobile --list
scripts.test:visual:smoke: playwright test tests/visual --grep "@smoke" --project=desktop && playwright test tests/visual --grep "@mobile-smoke" --project=mobile
scripts.test:visual:fast: playwright test tests/visual --grep "@fast" --project=desktop && playwright test tests/visual --grep "@mobile-fast" --project=mobile
scripts.test:visual:layout: playwright test tests/visual --grep "@layout" --project=desktop && playwright test tests/visual --grep "@mobile-layout" --project=mobile
scripts.test:visual:navigation: playwright test tests/visual --grep "@navigation" --project=desktop && playwright test tests/visual --grep "@mobile-navigation" --project=mobile
